itemLocation.linkage: file://\\徐露\D$\0000徐露工作文件\21泰州市国土空间总体规划\泰州市基础数据.gdb

lineage.Process: Merge DLTB1;DLTB2;DLTB3;DLTB4;DLTB5;DLTB6;DLTB7 D:\0000徐露工作文件\21泰州市国土空间总体规划\变更调查合并.shp "BSM "标识码" true true false 18 Text 0 0 attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
